seoTitle: Murrumbeena vs Murtoa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murrumbeena and Murtoa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrumbeena and Murtoa.
heading: Murrumbeena vs Murtoa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrumbeena, Victoria and Murtoa, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrumbeena has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Murtoa (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrumbeena or Murtoa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrumbeena has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Murtoa scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrumbeena scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Murtoa scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrumbeena or Murtoa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrumbeena has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
